settings.heading:
BUILDING
THE
SPIRIT OF
SPORT
settings.desc: BRIGHT has taken the classic game of soccer and given it a whole new spin, by creating a glow-in-the-dark ball that will keep you playing long after the stars have come out. With a focus on quality and innovation, BRIGHT is leading the charge in sport products. So, what are you waiting for? Get your game on, and light up the night with BRIGHT.

settings.title: The bright story
settings.cap:
Born in 2020, BRIGHT emerged from a simple desire: to play football, no matter the hour. Not satisfied with dated, battery-driven glow balls, we ventured into uncharted territories, experimenting, and collaborating. From this passion, our first prototype saw the light.

With BRIGHT, it's a game that truly never sleeps.

settings.title: MADE BY AND FOR ATHLETES
settings.cap:
We have spent months perfecting BRIGHT balls because we know what difference a good ball makes on the field. BRIGHT will always continue to innovate while creating the best experience for you!

We are always on the lookout for collaborations. Shoot us an email if you have something in mind!
